_doc: Reviewed route-anchor exceptions. Overrides select a current canonical record. Non-GTFS dispositions exclude a record from current GTFS matching and bind the review to its expected literal route_id (or null).

route_q48-serves-lga-2011.reason: The official 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign row records discontinuation of the historical LaGuardia Q48 and reuse of the Q48 designation for a distinct Glen Oaks service beginning June 30, 2025.
